creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 157820
provide submitter's patch in diff format instead of a shar

Hello,
In the future, shar(1) should not be used for patches to already existing ports. See the Porter's Handbook.  I've attached what you've provided in patch format all ready to apply.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/port-
upgrading.html

Portlint checks out good:
# portlint -ac
looks fine.
